entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - SAML 2.0 Automatic Certificate Renewal [metadata URL is must]
entry.content:
Hi @yogananda 

The SF certificate will expire in a couple of months to all customers (https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/setting-up-sap-successfactors-with-identity-authentication-and-identity-provisioning-services/migration-to-sap-cloud-identity-services-identity-authentication-service)

The documentation states "For customers/tenants using Identity Authentication (either as a real IDP or proxy IDP to a 3rd party corporate IDP, Identity Authentication will take care of their certificate update automatically."

Is the procedure you're describing supposed to be used for this scenario? I couldn't get clarity so far on how this is going to be executed and for this scenario I've added manually but in a recent upgrade made this year I've noticed the app is created with a blank metadata URL as part of the automatic process executed from the Upgrade Center in SSFF

Thanks

Diego

entry.title: BTP canary global account deletion
entry.content:
Hello community, I am new to the forum as well as SAP. I want to create a canary BTP global account. However, I made a big mistake. I assumed that a canary account would not have billing issues, so I added all permissions and created a subaccount to experiment with a project. Later, my manager told me it would be best to only add the services I need. Therefore, I decided to delete the account and create a new one, but I have to wait for 14 days and the account is suspended. [https://int.controlcenter.ondemand.com/index.html#/uc2/global_accounts]

I would like to ask if anyone has had a similar experience. Will I still be charged during this 14-day suspended period? I am concerned about the billing issue, so I am hesitant to create a new global account, but I really need to experiment with that project.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: SAP Joule icon missing in S/4HNA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we set up SAP Joule with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (TDD System).

The funny thing is now that some of my colleagues can see the diamond icon for SAP Joule in the Public Coud, but others can't. Even if they have the same roles in the system.

Does anybody have an idea how to define who can see the Joule icon?

BR Tobi

Thanks,

PLM Project System (PS) @SAPPS

entry.title: Update primary & secondary email for an user in SuccessFactors EC concurrently using OData API
entry.content:
Hi IDM Gurus,

For an user in SF moved from Onboarding module to EC, their personal email is carried forward and marked as primary email(for example "xxx@xxx.com" in PerEmail entity set as 'isPrimary=true'). Now when IDM generates business email(or example "yyy@yyy.com" ) and tries to set using OData API, I'm getting error "Only one email address can be set as primary"

I understand that, only one email can be set as primary and IDM is able to set business email as secondary. However in such case how do we set business email as primary and personal email as secondary in one request using OData?

I find SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/2749494/E to bundle both request in one OData payload but how do we bundle it in SAP IDM?

Here is IDM request -

Thank you for all for your contributions in the community over the years and I wish you all the best for what comes next 🙂

entry.title: Re: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Pa...
entry.content: Hi ArunJacob Thank you for your advice on database privileges. We are using SAP B1 internal authentication for the SB1 Hana users. On database level we see users like SYTEM, TECH-USER, B1ADMIN etc. But we do not see our internal users. There are some users like B1_4d4c535F502443230323341_RO B1_4d4c535F502443230323341_RW B1_4d4c535F5024432303233_RW B1_4d4c535F5024432303233_RO but the number of this dbs users is much lower than the number off SB1 system users. We did the permission update via Studio. But It did not solved the problem. Kindly could indicate where I could find the internal users in the DBS or how they are mapped to DBS users. We had this problem before in FP 2305 see https://me.sap.com/notes/3314556. In FP 2305HF1 and FP 2411 this was working. For some reason SAP B1 team has ask to urgently update to 2502 w/o testing. Best Regards, Boris

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Discard function in Import Collection
entry.content:
Hi,

As per the Import Collection: Business Impact and Dependencies section on the SAP Help Portal:

  • If Collection Change A (Version 1) is not imported, all its items will be included in Version 2 during import.

  • If you decide to discard Version 1 and import only Version 2, it will not have any dependency impact on Version 2.

  • Later, if you want to import items from Version 1, you can choose Export > All items. This will include the items that were not yet imported into the test tenant, along with the new version.

For more information, please refer to FAQ KBA 3126032 - Export/import Software Collections in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Frequently Asked Questions - SAP for Me > 37 QA

You can also refer to the detailed blog:
New Features for Key User Extensibility Transport ... - SAP Community

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: SAP Concur - Retrieving Receipt Images via file

I work in an Italian company and we are looking for a solution for electronic storage.

I saw this article of yours and I wanted to ask you if it works and is compliant for other Italian clients.

How could the process work? e.g. our storage provider has to connect to Concur's SFTP and retrieve Zip files?

 

thank you.

entry.content:

entry.title: How to create a data function on posting date with consideration of fabric calendar
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are working using Fiori App "Custom Analytical Query" and want to create a date function on the object Posting Date. We want to have the system select the previous working day.

Meaning if it is 31st of May (Friday) the system should fill in the 30th of May (Thursday) in the posting date.

If it is Monday the 27 of May the system should fill in Friday the 24. of May. 

Depending on the actual fabric calender the variable on posting date should fill in the last working day.

How is that to be done in S/4HANA. We are not using Eclipse. We have only the Fiori Apps in S/4HANA Cloud available.

Could you please help? Thank you

entry.title: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content:
Hi
requirement from the busines site is to set up copy control parameter to get allocation number (ZUONR) equal to refference number (XBLNR).
Other words, they want in FBL5N have view that allocation numer has the same value ass refference.

could you suggest / help hot to set up, please ? should i use VTFA ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS
entry.content:
After the Mapping of the technical objects int he mapping table. During a sync SSAM backend component MAIF will call the GIS system with the provided spacial ID's to get the Co-ordinates for each relevant object. This will then be sent to the mobile app.

SSAM does not use Icons from GIS. SSAM By default uses its own Icons.
If needed these can be changed in the client branding. But they are not synced with the GIS icons. 

So After syncing you will see the Objects which have Co-ordinates on the SSAM Maps. By default with the OoB SSAM Icons.

entry.title: Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<SID> can we get real user ID via charm?
entry.content:
Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<SID>, can we get real user ID via charm?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<...
entry.content:
Hello,

In order to check the user ID that did the import into production, you may follow these steps:

  1. With the transport request number, go to the Solution Manager and search in table /TMWFLOW/TRORD_N. This will give you the task list number .
  2. Go to the ChaRM admin cockpit (transaction CM_ADM_COCKPIT), open the task list , and go to the monitor tab
  3. check the logs for import jobs with the timestamp of the import in the relevant system 
  4. the job logs should have the name of the user who launched the import.

Best regards,

Miguel Ariño

entry.title: Re: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
You cannot.

And I think you should not. That's not how Event-driven Architecture should work. You need to work with what the events give you. What I suggest: You need to store the delivery date on BTP and compare yourself when you get a Changed event. To get the data, you can either read the data with an API call or create a derived event which contains any data you need, e.g. the delivery date. There are problems with putting too much data into the event (DPP/GDPR, security) why you want to use an API call, this is scenario and business-driven.

At this point in time we have no technical access to what has changed - generically that is just not available. Maybe, one time in the distant future, we may look at utilizing Change Documents. Alternatively, you could create a local event handler that processes the event and somehow find out if the date has changed (probably through a local persistency), if you really, really need to make sure to only send changed events.

entry.title: Re: unable to Create multiple templates with different la...
entry.content: nope sap recommended to create sperate template for different lang

entry.title: ROW_NUMBER does gaps via AMDP but no gaps via ABAP SQL, bug in my code?
entry.content:
In ABAP 7.58, I have written an SQL query with ROW_NUMBER( ) OVER( ), in two versions, AMDP and pure ABAP SQL.

If Via AMDP HANA SQL, I obtain gaps in the numbers, but no gaps via ABAP SQL, why is there a difference?

1. Via AMDP/CDS Table Function, called from ABAP via SELECT * FROM zcds WHERE bukrs = '1000' :

return select 
  bkpf.bukrs,
  bkpf.waers,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as wrbtr,
  ...
  cast(' ' as belnr_d) as extbelnr,
  ...
  row_number() over ( ) as idnum,
from acdoca
  inner join ...
where ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields
;

2. Via ABAP SQL:

INSERT zzz FROM ( select 
  ROW_NUMBER( ) OVER( ) AS ROW_NUMBER,
  bkpf~bukrs,
  bkpf~waers,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as wrbtr,
  ...
  cast(' ' as char( 10 ) ) as extbelnr,
  ...
from acdoca
  inner join ...
where bukrs = '1000'
  and ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields
).

Thanks

Sandra

My system: ABAP 7.58

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation: Difference between Cycle Run Group and Allocation Hierarchy explained (2QL
Re: ROW_NUMBER does gaps via AMDP but no gaps via ABAP SQ...
entry.content:
It's normal.

1.
The AMDP query doesn't filter on BUKRS (company code), at this stage ROW_NUMBER is calculated correctly without gap.
But you then filter the lines with the second ABAP SQL query, WHERE bukrs = '1000', it's why there are some gaps in IDNUM, the gaps correspond to the lines filtered out, because ROW_NUMBER has not been executed again.
If you move WHERE bukrs = '1000' to the AMDP query, and ABAP SQL SELECT doesn't contain any WHERE clause, it will work the same as only one query like in the case 2.

2.
There is only one SELECT, containing WHERE bukrs = '1000', so ROW_NUMBER is calculated without gaps.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT Version 2025-03 (4.35.0) crashes *continu...
entry.content: Hi @alvaro_blanco, regarding the error message in ADT: we recommend to open a ServiceNow ticket with the following component: BC-DWB-AIE. Our colleagues can then work on the problem more efficiently and try to find a solution for it. Best regards!

entry.title: Hackathon Tachyonix - Edição Recife
entry.content:
Se você é desenvolvedor ABAP ou consultor funcional com conhecimento em ABAP, temos um desafio especial para você! 🚀

A Tachyonix está promovendo o Hackathon – Edição Recife, uma competição que vai testar suas habilidades em um ambiente inovador e competitivo.

💡 Como funciona?


✅ Masterclass de abertura: 28/04 (Online)
✅ Período de desenvolvimento: 30/04 a 08/05 (Online)
✅ Apresentação final: 09/05 (Presencial em Recife, na Accenture – Marco Zero)
✅ Premiação: 10/05, no SAP Inside Track Recife

🏆 E os prêmios?
🥇 1º lugar: PlayStation 5
🥈 2º lugar: Smartphone
🥉 3º lugar: Tablet

📌 Importante: Para participar, é necessário estar em Recife no dia 9 de maio para apresentar seu projeto.

🔗 Garanta sua vaga agora: https://materiais.tachyonix.io/lp-hackathon-tachyonix-edicao-recife

entry.title: Re: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content:
Hello @lukkurylo ,

it depends on what the source document is for your billing document. If the source document is a sales order/contract, then VTFA is the correct transaction. On the header level of copy control, you can define determination rules for XBLNR and ZUONR fields:

Best regards

High volume Scenarios
Any latency during transmission

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
Good day,

Since SAP provides out-of-box trusted SAP Cloud CA signed user certificates for this solution, does anyone know if SAP can provide a trusted certificate to be used in on-premise SNC communications too? We would like to avoid creating a private CA and distributing it to thousands of users. The SAP CA signed certificate would be used in place for the SNC SAPCryptolib PSE with the user pattern as used in this solution e.g. CN=, L=xxx.accounts.ondemand.com, OU=xxx-secure-login-service, OU=SAP BTP Clients, O=SAP SE, C=DE ...and signed by SAP. Essentially I would create the SNC PSE with the solution user pattern and CN of server, create a CSR and send it to SAP SE Cloud CA to be signed.

Does SAP offer this?

entry.title: AUC partial capitalization not completely using prior year acquisition first
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

We are partially capitalizing assets on ECC 6.0 and auditors have requested an explanation as to why SAP splits the capitalization into current and prior year "streams" with transaction types 331, 336 (asset shell) 338 and 339 (AUC asset). In particular, why the system does not use all of the prior year acquisition values first, before using the current year acquisitions, even if the prior year acquisitions are sufficient to cover the total capitalization value. 

The image below shows the AUC acquisitions in 22/23 of 4,511,271.95.

In 23/24, further acquisitions of 2,313,975.22 was settled to the AUC asset.

When a partial capitalization of 3,453,275.80 was done in 23/24, the value was split into 1,170,770 current year acquisition and 2,282,505.80 prior year acquisition.

Instead of decreasing the prior year (22/23) acquisition value of 4,511,271.95 down to 1,057,996.15. 

From what I can determine, SAP used the total acquisitions for current and prior year: 6,825,247.17 and calculated the % of prior and current acquisitions to the acquisition total. And then applied this percentage during the capitalization process. 66% to 34%. 

Is it SAP standard or best business practice to calculate this split in such a manner? Or is this a configurable calculation. If so, which table or transaction code can be used to view, amend and/or substantiate this calculation?

The assistance would be much appreciated. 

Kind Regards,

Vaughan

AUC transaction detail

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: There are ways to accomplish this without a UDF at all with adding additional occurrences and mapping 1 -> 1st index, 2 -> 2nd index, and so on.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT

The method contains a BAPI call, and the error occurs when executing the statement cl_exchange_rates=>put. How can I resolve this issue, considering that COMMIT WORK is being triggered within the BAPI call?

entry.title: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have an issue as below and request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

I have a custom uibb in mdg for Customer where OVP is mapped with personalization.

When we create a customer, custom uibb is not visible in screen but when we do a 'reset to default' then the custom uibb is visible.

I close the window completely, then i create a new customer...again the custom uibb is not available.

Can i know the start place where all the uibb begins in terms of some standard class/methods.

On top it, do i need to do any additional settings in system for personalization. Thanks.

 

 

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: Re: SAP South California Community is LIVE!!!
entry.content: Thanks so much @VijayetaSharma for leading the effort to bring people together in sunny Southern Cali!

entry.title: Re: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detec
entry.content: If the test programs you mentioned also work fine in the Quality system, I would rule out a connection problem, at least it is not a customising error. A weird intermittent connection error could still be possible but I would not look in that direction.

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content:
Hi Andy,

The problem you are having is because you need to use Sessions, the Report request is not going to the original Object but starting a new instance

See this KBA on how to:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1985571

Don

entry.title: Issue Setting Multiple Intervals for Variable using setVariableValue via Scripted Button in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working on a scripted button in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to dynamically set values for a variable using the setVariableValue() method. While this works perfectly for a single interval, I’m encountering issues when trying to set multiple intervals at once.

For example, I’d like to set the variable to include the following ranges:

  • 1000–1999

  • 3000–3999

  • 6000–6999

However, when I execute the following script, only the last interval (6000–6999) is applied.:


Chart_1.getDataSource().setVariableValue("HRHN_SAC", {
from: "1000",
to: "1999",
from: "3000",
to: "3999",
from: "6000",
to: "6999",
exclude: false
});

It seems that SAC is overwriting the previous values and retaining only the final one.

Am I missing something here? Is there an alternative approach to pass multiple intervals to a variable in a single script?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards,
Feras

entry.title: Re: RAP List Report aggregation missing only in deployed...
entry.content: I found that, in the BAS I should use Analitical Table instead of responsive table. I changed this option and deploy the app again and the totals appers.

entry.title: Re: crystal report issue
entry.content:
What version of CR for VS are you using? SP 37 is the latest, SP 35 is when SQL 2022 was supported.

You can get SP 37 and future SP's from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

NOTE: always use the latest SP

entry.title: Re: Bulk Hiring & Onboarding – Looking for Input
entry.content: There are a number of features to help process mass onboarding.  Starting in Recruiting, the initiate onboarding trigger can be done in mass with in-app manual selection or you could use process automation to trigger it upon moving to a specific status.  Within SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding there are a number of feature that are discussed in this webinar. SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: Mass onboarding feature overview

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Setting Up Core Tool User interface
entry.content:
Hi Doris,

Sorry for the very late response, I hadn't seen your new message, but thanks for your feedback.
I don't have the same OS to run tests myself, but I see you've got spaces around the "equal" sign, in the "SET" command.
I'm not sure this makes a difference, but can you please consider removing those spaces, to make the assignment is performed properly?
SET SAPCC_JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\etc.

If this doesn't help, I'd suggest writing a couple other, simpler, "SET" statements (with any unrelated test variables), and displaying the values of the variables immediately afterwards, to see if the assignment works for them, and what differentiates them from the faulty statement.

If it's not too late, will you please let me know whether this helps or not?

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Prerequisite for implement alumni for ONB2.0
entry.content: Offboarding is a prerequisite for the new Alumni feature.  Check out this blog for more details: Alumni experience-1h2025-release

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Serve...

entry.title: Tu mujhmein aur se

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: Hi Don, that suggestion doesn't help. The ReportDocument that is saved to Session is before the client prompts the user for parameter value - I've just tried it with a single worker process and it prompts for the parameter again every time you do anything. It is working fine without session other than the client end prompted parameters... are the client/user entered parameter not stored in ViewState or a form field, they can't be part of the ReportDocument because the value is not known when it is loaded. thanks

entry.title: Re: Tu mujhmein aur se
entry.content: NCP ka lagta hain ki cycle ka kha bhi parichay diya code ke liye hi nahin toh bhi parichay dete

entry.title: Unable to pass the Exchange property from one Iflow to anothe IFlow Process Direct in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi , 

I am trying to pass the Exchange property from one iflow to other. I tried in below procedure. 

source iflow: 

set property 

mapped the property to header 

Target iflow: 

get property using $:header.headername}

i am able to see the header in source iflow , but the same value is not populating in the target iflow. 

I checked few blogs and tried in simple way but no luck. 

Please do the needful. 

Regards , 

Giridhar

entry.title: Re: unable to Create multiple templates with different la...

for different language, you have to translate your original form, then upload, it will extract the translated text.

it won't be a different form template if I am not wrong.

probably from "Manage Texts" that tab?

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content: Thank you for the response, the way the flagged items show up in the library is not very prominent. Hence asking if there is any other way to highlight new and featured trainings?

entry.title: IMDesignTimeObjectMonitor or DPAGENT - Is there any API that we have for this in SDI or HANA DB
entry.content:
We are trying to automate the monitoring of FLOWGRAPH and REPLICATION TASK in PERSON_NAME DB or DP AGENT (View - IMDesignTimeObjectMonitor). Do we have any API available in the system that we can use for integration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: IMDesignTimeObjectMonitor or DPAGENT - Is there any A...
entry.content:
There is a REST API available for versions of HANA including the xsengine, so mainly on-premise systems. It is not installed/enabled by default. Documentation to help you download and deploy the API is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SMART_DATA_INTEGRATION/bd4ae8b11fd749cabb248aff53837eb8/f4d19e93c3434b0386cfe3c987c1a416.html

Also review the Business Accelerator Hub page detailing methods of the API, such as /tasks/{taskName}/executions/{execId} for the status of a certain task run: https://api.sap.com/api/EnterpriseInfoMgmt/resource/Task_Execution

If the REST API is not available on your HANA instance, build a solution using SQL procedures to retrieve the information from views provided by SDI. For example TASK_EXECUTIONS or TASK_OPERATIONS_EXECUTIONS.

entry.title: Re: Unable to pass the Exchange property from one Iflow to anothe IFlow Process Direct in SAP CPI
entry.content: You need to make sure you have added that header into the allowed headers of the 2nd flow.

entry.title: Re: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content: Good to know. Thanks for your sharing your experience. I suspect perhaps this is partial delivery of roadmap item Enabling embedded sites as local entry point for multitenant business solutions

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Setting Up Core Tool User interface
entry.content:
Dear François,

Thanks a lot for the reply. Indeed, the issue was with those spaces between the "equal" sign. It was the last part that I thought the issue could be, as a similar SET statement and script is working since version 3.0 of CC 😀 
I also liked the suggestion to display the value of the variable immediately afterward to check how that variable was set, but luckily it was not needed. 

Now I can access the latest version of CC 2023 SP03 on my LapTop running on Windows 10 PRO.


Again thanks a lot for you support and care,
Doris

entry.title: Notificacion de SDI no se genera en reporte S_AHR_61015994
entry.content:
Buen día Expertos,

Al momento de realizar una recontratación de un empleado a una nueva Unidad Organizativa (UO), o movimiento de una UO a otra, se genera el infotipo 0372 con la fecha de recontratación correctamente, pero cuando se ejecuta el reporte S_AHR_61015994 para dicho empleado; NO se genera notificación de SDI al IMSS.

Actualmente he revisado que los infotipos esten correctos, IT0006, IT0007 e IT0009, además he revisado la tabla V_T5F99K2 y todo se ve correcto.

Agradezco de antemano su apoyo para tratar de resolver este caso.

entry.title: Re: Rejected Records with Issue - "Data Access Control vi...
entry.content: It looks good now. I haven't done any thing (like re-saving the schedule). I just navigated through the dimension and model. The latest load completed successfully without any warnings. Thanks, Phani

entry.title: SAP ABAP RAP Query String parameters not available to access
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I created service using Unmanaged scenario using ABAP RAP... Below are the details for reference. 

Issue : I am not able access Query String parameter in code: I need param1, param2, param3 values in code 

www.abc.com/GetData?param1=10&param2=20&param3=30

Created Custom Root entity with few fields and Implemented Interface if_rap_query_provider and added below code in Custom Root entity

@EndUserText.label: 'Shimano API-WOrder/WTask'
@ObjectModel: {
    query: {
        implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_EWM_WAREHOUSE_TASK'
    }
}
define root custom entity ZCE_WAREHOUSEORDERTASK
  with parameters 
  @Consumption.hidden: true
        WHO1 : num10
{
  key WHO     : num10;
  key LGNUM   : /scwm/lgnum;
      TANUM   : numc12;
      HUIDENT : char20;
}

Below is my Query Provide Select Method code for reference :

DATA:ls_data TYPE /scwm/who,
         lt_data TYPE /scwm/tt_who.
    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      DATA(lv_top)     = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
      IF lv_top < 0.
        lv_top = 1.
      ENDIF.
      DATA(lt_parameters) = io_request->get_parameters(  ).
      DATA(lv_search_string) = io_request->get_search_expression( ).
      DATA(lv_skip)    = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
      DATA(lt_sort)    = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
      DATA : lv_orderby TYPE string.
      LOOP AT lt_sort INTO DATA(ls_sort).
        IF ls_sort-descending = abap_true.
          lv_orderby = |'{ lv_orderby } { ls_sort-element_name } DESCENDING '|.
        ELSE.
          lv_orderby = |'{ lv_orderby } { ls_sort-element_name } ASCENDING '|.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
      DATA(lv_conditions) =  io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_sql_string( ).
      SELECT * FROM /scwm/who INTO TABLE lt_data
              WHERE (lv_conditions).
      "IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested(  ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_data ) ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_data ).
      "ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

WHO1 is Parameter name which I am trying to access value of. My expectation was to get value of WH01 at line number 8 in above code, which is not happening. I am getting blank internal table.

Need is to access parameter from Query String Only using GET method.

I am already able to access these parameters when Passed in Header, Body and by using POST method which is triggered using an Action.

Please help how can I access these parameters from Query String using GET method.

Thanks-

entry.content:
We are trying to determine if we have a similar app in the Public Cloud to the one we previously had in ECC (SCU0) for comparing customizing settings between systems (Dev, Test, Prod)

(Fiori Library we checked)

Thank you!

In you examples you've used a standard program, if you could provide with a Z program would be amazing.

entry.title: Using Learning Journey Academic Lessons (wrappers)
entry.content:
For years I looked for ways to use the SAP Learning Journeys in my classes without an additional cost to my students. Now we have academic lessons that bridge the gap between SAP training and theory in the classroom and students do not have to pay extra for them. I am excited about how these "wrappers" will facilitate teaching with SAP. 

My colleague will be using the Accounting in S/4HANA in her Accounting Information Systems class to teach tests of controls and business processes. How will you use the academic lessons in your classroom?

entry.title: Pending Termination Workflow details to be sent to Identity management system.
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 With our current setup of Successfactors to Identity System,  the integration triggers only when the termination workflow is fully approved. Because of this some of the users may retain access for a few days post-termination.

So while brainstorming one of the ideas was to provide the pending termination workflow data to the identity team ( via API) including the effective date of termination record and they can take further action.

I tried using Mypendingworkflow API or wfRequest API which had its own set of issues where we cannot get effective date in the former and event reason not filterable in the latter.

So I am here seeking guidance for this use case in case anyone has encountered this issue.

entry.title: Re: User Defined Field for OSRN table

You can create user defined fields through SAP SDK (DI API), if it is not available in SBO.

 

Best regards

It has a very good Basic SAP B1 free course.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.261...

Hello,

 

Try to deactivate any addon and clean SM_OBS_DLL folder

If the problems persist you might need to do a fresh install of SAP B1 Client. 

 

Best regards

Since our upgrade we have an issue in showing the values of 2 custom fields in the view of transaction FAGLB03.

The columns are shown, but the values are not displayed. I are just emtpy fields. By double clicking on a line, the details are shown, there the values are shown correctly.

The custom fields are included in FAGLPOSX.

How can I fix this issue? Thanks!

Thanks Dallas.

Hi @narasingha ,

Your blogs on SAP Datasphere are nice.

Can you send the link to the first image?

Are a DPI Agent and Cloud Connector both needed for replication? as shown in the image

entry.title: Deprecation of Rehire Inactive Employee (1H 2025)
entry.content:
As part of our ongoing efforts to streamline and optimize HR processes we are deprecating and planning to eventually remove the Rehire Inactive Employee feature from Admin Center. 

 
Why are we doing this?
 
This deprecation simplifies the rehiring process for inactive employees by providing Duplicate Check as the sole, comprehensive UI entry point to the process. Duplicate Check has the following advantages over Rehire Inactive Employee:
  • Duplicate Check includes more data points such as national IDs when searching for inactive employee matches. This additional layer of verification reduces the number of matches, making the search results more precise and manageable.
  • When displaying matched employees, Duplicate Check provides detailed information about their current and past employments. This includes crucial details like legal entities and contingent employment indicators, giving HR a clearer understanding of the employee's work history.
  • You can rehire an employee whose termination date is in the future. As long as the rehire date is after the termination date, Duplicate Check provides options to either accept the match or proceed with rehiring under new employment terms. This flexibility ensures that HR can manage rehiring processes efficiently, even for employees who are scheduled for future terminations
(screenshot from demo instance)

What do you need to know?

Here are the key milestones for deprecation and deletion:

MilestoneDateDefinition
End of DevelopmentMay 16, 2025The deprecation milestone after which SAP stops enhancing a product or part of a product. You can continue to use the software, but you should begin planning for a time when it will no longer be available for use. We still fix high-priority bugs.
End of MaintenanceMay 16, 2025The deprecation milestone after which SAP does not fix bugs or deliver patches for the software. SAP continues to answer your how-to questions. We strongly encourage you to adopt an alternative method for your business scenario.
DeletedMay 16, 2026The deprecation milestone when a feature is no longer available for productive use. You should now be using an alternative method for your business scenario.

If you currently use Rehire Inactive Employee for rehiring, we recommend you begin planning for a smooth transition to Duplicate Check and familiarize your HR administrators and managers with its process. Additionally we recommend updating any training materials or process documentation in order to prepare for the transition before May 16th 2026.

Please feel free to reach out and leave a comment below this blog post if you have any questions or need further clarification on this process. Your feedback is always welcome!

entry.title: Re: Does SAP BRF+ Comes under SAP HANA Clean core approac...
entry.content: But we came to know that - Regarding the BRF+ Framework, the classes and interfaces to consume their business rules are not released for ABAP Cloud usage. Wrapper classes can be used to enable cloud consumption.

entry.title: Inspection Lot cancellation after Goods receipt and putaway
entry.content:
Hello,

for the vendor return process in EWM, we need to cancel the inspection lot before return to vendor is initiated from MIGO with reference to GR material document.

Is there any way to cancel the inspection lot through config or enhancement, so that user don't need to manually cancel it every time before vendor return. 

Regards,

Atul

entry.title: Training, practice, free usage of system
entry.content: Where I can get free access to the online, live platform where I can practice platform ? ( I would like to get into industry but cant find free access to the platform where I can practice some transactions. Please help.

entry.title: Re: API Management Principal Propagation for BizHub Enter...
entry.content: Update. We finally were able to determine that the build as stated wasn't going to work. We found that I was using the wrong end point for retrieving the needed token. However, it was also not an option with a single call anyway. The resolution is to use two calls, which is typical, to make this happen. One for the OAuth token and then one for the service call. It does mean that 3rd party (internal to our org) callers have to build this into their applications but it will function. We have only prototyped the functionality but it seems to do the trick so we'll scale it up for the org use and call it good.

entry.title: Missing Profit Center (VBRP-PRCTR) in Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We are facing an issue where the profit center (field VBRP-PRCTR) is missing from several billing document items due to the customize logic. However, the value still exists in the corresponding COPA document, as shown in the attached screenshots.

This issue is currently blocking our business from performing delta accrual postings, due to the missing profit center value in the billing item. It causes delays in our financial closing process and affects the accuracy of our monthly reporting.

Upon further investigation, we found that the required value still exists in the COPA table. Therefore, we are considering the following workaround as a temporary solution:

  • Develop a custom Z-program to retrieve PRCTR from COPA table where RBELN = Billing Document Number and RPOSN = Item Number.
  • Update the missing value back into VBRP-PRCTR for affected billing documents.

We plan to execute this program during non-business hours to minimize system impact.

So, has anyone encountered this kind of situation before? Is our proposed solution technically feasible and safe, or are there any alternative recommendations you would suggest?
